tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: Mina and Jae are inviting me to Echo, but my midterm review is incomplete. With high energy yet significant sleep debt, I'm weighing going out versus finishing my studies.
Midterm progress increased to 0.78, but the club invitation window closed and Mina is leaving now. I must finish studying before sleep debt worsens.
I declined Mina's Echo invitation, prioritizing my incomplete midterm review. My energy is high enough to finish studying before addressing my sleep debt.
After 2 hours of study, my midterm progress jumped to 0.92, nearly complete. With high energy and minimal sleep debt, I can now focus on rest or social plans.
After a full 8-hour sleep, my energy is fully restored at 10.0 with zero sleep debt, confirming I am ready to address remaining tasks without fatigue.
The midterm is complete, and with full energy restored, I can now address my sleep debt or plan social activities.
The club welcomed me warmly, confirming my social plan is a viable option given my high energy and completed midterm.

goals.description: Complete remaining study tasks for tomorrow's midterm exam.
goals.rationale: Deadline is Fri 09:00 (tomorrow), and current progress is only 0.6, requiring immediate completion to meet the hard deadline.

goals.description: Plan or execute club social activity with friend group.
goals.rationale: Deadline is Thu 21:00 (today evening). It is a soft task but must be scheduled before the end of the day to avoid missing the deadline.

goals.description: Run a load of laundry.
goals.rationale: Deadline is Sun 23:59 (far future). It is a soft task with no urgency compared to the other two pending items.

agent.last_reasoning: Exam prep is already complete (1.0 progress), so studying adds no value and only lowers energy. The club social was successfully attended, fulfilling the medium-priority task. Sleeping recovers energy for Sunday's laundry without risking the exam deadline.
